description_long: This is a luxurious, mid-century modern swivel chair featuring a deep, dark brown leather upholstery with button tufting on both the seat and the backrest. The chair's backrest and seat are generously padded and contoured for ergonomic comfort, framed by a curved wooden shell with a rich walnut finish. The armrests are wide, flat, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the seat structure, and covered in matching leather. The chair sits atop a sturdy, black, five-pointed star base equipped with small casters for mobility. The central support column is robust and metallic, providing both stability and a sleek, modern aesthetic. The overall design is iconic, reminiscent of the Eames Lounge Chair, and would be well-suited for upscale urban interiors, offices, or lounges.
description: A high-end, dark brown leather swivel chair with a walnut wood shell, padded armrests, and a black five-star base with casters. The chair is plush, ergonomic, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chair's thick, contoured backrest, padded armrest, and the curvature of the wooden shell.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the button-tufted leather seat and backrest, wide padded armrests, and the symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and shell curvature, with the seat and backrest profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, curved wooden shell of the backrest and the full width of the chair's back.
attribute_central_support_column: A black, metallic, cylindrical column connecting the seat to a five-pointed star base, fixed and sturdy.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, wide, and gently curved with deep button tufting, upholstered in dark brown leather and framed by a walnut-finished wooden shell.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, flat, and padded armrests, fully upholstered in matching leather and seamlessly attached to the seat structure.
